description: Implement operational coordination loop between ANALYST, EXECUTOR, and AUDITOR roles through exchange file mechanism. Create governance/coordination_exchange.json to enable structured handoffs and state tracking between the three core roles in the autonomous system.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap item 12 ANALYST/EXECUTOR/AUDITOR COORDINATION LOOP is next after completed LEDGER ROUTER items. Exchange file needed for operational coordination between core roles.
